data.body: DONE — T0 deps lane shipped in src/rebar/grounding/deps.py (commit 5c3d5a5c). All 5 ACs met: manifest/lockfile enumeration across pypi/npm/cargo/go/maven/gem; deps.dev existence (200→refuted, else abstain); the abstain gauntlet (PEP503/crates/go/npm normalization + workspace + stdlib + import/dist-name + 429/5xx/timeout/offline → abstain) makes a false-absent structurally impossible; unknown ecosystem→abstain; fail-open tested. 32 unit tests (HTTP mocked) + 8 gated live deps.dev checks + mypy clean. CODE REVIEW (subagent): no-false-absent invariant VERIFIED — every non-200 path returns abstain, no refuted reachable except a real 200; fixed PEP503 leading/trailing-separator normalization (was a missed-refute); stdlib over-abstain documented. Closing.
